notes:
The FPS in lobby with many players are terrible. Switch to another lobby with 2-3 people, and it runs smoothly.
Sometimes, the game will have a 1 sec lag. This might be because of the notifications in KDE plasma.
The game has crashed ~4 times (with 70 hours in-game), causing the whole computer to "freeze". (game closes itself after ~5 minutes, and computer runs fine again)
Also, for new people reading this. First cutscene won't load. Press Escape and skip.
Other than these points, the game are very much playable.
Recommend using DXVK
